name: Chinese Pork Loin
recipeIngredient: 1 boneless pork loin roast, 4 to 6 pounds
2 tablespoons fresh ginger, grated and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except pork in a non-reactive bowl and blend well.
2. Pour the marinade over the pork loin and marinate in a glass baking dish for 4 to 6 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Place the pork loin on the center of the cooking grate. Cook for 1 1/2 hours, or until a meat thermometer reads 160 degrees Fahrenheit. Turn the meat occasionally to prevent over-browning.
4. Remove from grill and let rest for 10 minutes before carving. Makes 8 to 12 servings.
